name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
Medium size in stock!!️
Newest Caro Puffy Bag from the brick-and-mortar store, classic quilted pattern 💌, high-quality gunmetal hardware, elegant yet cool, excellent touch of calfskin 🐮, exquisite and unique chain, multiple carrying styles, good capacity, sweet and chic, come get the Caro that fits your style 👏🏻
size: 25.5*15*8cm
